title: Don't let market swing ruin your Mutual Fund portfolio: Expert explain when to review, rebalance, and what to avoid
summary: Mutual funds are effective for wealth creation, but regular portfolio reviews are essential. Investors should conduct light checks periodically and a detailed review annually to ensure alignment with financial goals, prevent allocation drift, and avoid common pitfalls during evaluations.

From extended memorandum deadlines to upcoming state consultations, the latest updates highlight progress on salary revisions, allowances, pensions and fitment factor discussions.

title: Why life insurance continues to be a key pillar of financial protection and long-term financial planning
summary: Financial security starts with protection. Life insurance remains a crucial pillar of financial planning, helping families manage uncertainties, safeguard future goals, build financial resilience and create long-term security through adequate coverage, and thoughtful financial preparation.

title: Dearness Allowance: Here's all we know about Punjab, West Bengal and Himachal Pradesh govts' discussions on DA hikes

title: Will ₹10 crore be enough to retire comfortably? Expert says ‘wrong approach’ | Use this simple formula to understand
summary: Determining retirement needs requires calculating future monthly expenses, factoring in inflation, and estimating the necessary corpus. For example, a current expense of ₹70,000 may grow to ₹3 lakh in 30 years, necessitating a corpus of about ₹5.2 crore for adequate retirement funding.

title: How are dark patterns causing ₹25,000 crore loss to consumers annually?
summary: The CCPA issued guidelines in 2023 to prevent and regulate dark patterns. The authority has listed 13 specific dark patterns. It has issued an advisory to strengthen compliance with guidelines and even penalised some platforms. However, the compliance still needs to improve.
